form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4.5 m fourth behind Heave Away at this track over 1609m 15000CLM last start. Before that was beaten 1.5 metres second again at this track same class on March 23. Racing well and worth each-way consideration.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 1.5 m finishing second behind Movin' On Up at this track over 1609m in a 15000CLM on March 25 at $4.20. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing third behind Checkonwilliam at this track over 1609m in a 15000CLM on April 2 at $7.01. Strong winning hope.
